messages.content:
Explain what the acronyms RRC and NAS stand for in the context of the CVE.

Possible denial of service due to out of memory while processing RRC and NAS OTA message in Snapdragon Auto, Snapdragon Industrial IOT, Snapdragon Mobile

In the context of the CVE, RRC stands for Radio Resource Control, which manages the connection and mobility management tasks in cellular networks. NAS stands for Non-Access Stratum, which handles signaling and messaging processes not directly related to radio access.
